statement: In every magma, Equation 967 (`x = y * ((z * y) * (y * w))`) implies Equation 1276 (`x = y * (((x * x) * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0920
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z y) (op y w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x x) x) y))
